name: NZXT C1000 Gold Core 1000W Fully Modular ATX 3.1 Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - Cybenetics Platinum - 135mm FDB Fan with Zero RPM Mode - 12V-2x6 PCIe 5.1 Connector (600W) - 3x PCIe 6+2-pin Connectors (PA-0G3BB-US)
